story.headline: Where Every Petal Carries A Promise
story.body: ELAROSE began at a kitchen table, with one bouquet, one girl, and one belief: that gifting can be a love language. Today, we hand-craft luxury keepsakes for the moments you never want to forget.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To slow down gifting. To make it intentional, handmade, and unforgettable. We craft gifts that feel like heirlooms — never disposable, never ordinary.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where every milestone is wrapped in something handmade. Where the giver feels as cherished as the receiver. Where luxury is measured in love, not in logos.

steps.title: Listen
steps.description: We meet you on Instagram and learn the story behind the gift.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Our artisans sketch a unique piece, choosing fabrics and florals.

steps.title: Craft
steps.description: Hours of slow handwork, petal by petal, ribbon by ribbon.

steps.title: Wrap
steps.description: Signature ivory wrap, blush ribbon, gold seal. Then to your love.

timeline.headline: From a Single Bouquet, A Brand Was Born

events.title: A bouquet for a friend
events.description: It all started with a single pipe cleaner bouquet, gifted on a quiet Tuesday.

events.title: ELAROSE is born
events.description: We opened our DMs and the first 100 orders arrived within a month.

events.title: Studio launch
events.description: A tiny boutique studio became home to our growing artisan team.

events.title: Pan-India delivery
events.description: From Mumbai to Manipur — gifts are now travelling everywhere love does.
